content: I'm trying to plan my 62nd birthday celebration for next month. I want to do something different this year - any creative ideas?
Happy early birthday! What kind of celebration are you thinking about? Something active, social, or maybe a mix of both?
I'm definitely leaning toward something active. I've been getting back into salsa dancing lately and thought maybe a dance-themed party could be fun.
A salsa dance party sounds fantastic! You could rent a small studio space and hire an instructor for a group lesson. How many people were you thinking of inviting?

Probably around 15-20 people. Most of my friends are pretty active too - we often go on photography walks together around the city. I thought maybe we could do a photo scavenger hunt before the dancing?
That's a brilliant combination! A photo scavenger hunt would be a great way to kick things off. Do you have any specific locations in mind for the hunt?

I was thinking of starting at the waterfront park since it has so many iconic spots. Plus, Coco (my golden retriever) could come along for the walk. She's still pretty young and energetic since I adopted her from the shelter last spring.
Including Coco sounds perfect! The waterfront would give everyone great photo opportunities. After the hunt, you could head to a dance studio for the salsa lesson. Have you found a place yet?

Not yet, but I know a few studios that offer weekend rentals. I'm also thinking about asking my friend Miguel to DJ - he's been getting into travel blogging and has collected some great Latin music from his trips.
Miguel sounds like the perfect DJ for this! The combination of photography, dancing, and travel-themed music would make for a really unique celebration. What about food and drinks?
